summary_line: NYC virtual fee-only RIA founded by Priya Malani — former Merrill Lynch HNW advisor and former professional ballerina. Targets six-figure-earning 30-somethings (HENRYs). Core product: 'The Stash Plan' = $5,000 flat-fee 4-week deep dive. Edgy tone ('Get Your Financial Sh*t Together'). $51.7M AUM, 2 advisors, 3 employees per ADV, 0 DRPs. Smallest firm in this round.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 167072 — 3 employees, 2 advisors, $51,715,642 regulatory AUM, 0 disciplinary disclosures. SEC file 801-105050. Legal name: 'STASH WEALTH, LLC.'

Site capture: extract.ts captured homepage only (sitemap=0, nav=0, known-paths=0); followed up via WebFetch on /how-we-work + /about. Brand voice deliberately edgy: H1 = 'Get Your Financial Sh*t Together.' Tagline: 'Home Of The HENRYs.' Sub-tagline: 'In your 30s making six-figures?' / 'Welcome.' Core product: **The Stash Plan** — a $5,000 flat-fee, 4-week deep dive into a client's finances, life, and goals; one-on-one with a dedicated advisor; combines 'cutting-edge financial tools' with 'deeply human insights.' Founder Priya Malani — origin story: started Stash after watching her parents' financial stress despite her father's successful six-figure medical career; previously at Merrill Lynch with HNW clients; former professional ballerina. Phone area code 212 (NYC). Positioning: 'high-achieving 30-somethings' wanting financial clarity; reframes money as 'a source of empowerment and joy' rather than stress. Content presence is personality-led around Priya. /the-stash-plan returned 404 in WebFetch (URL pattern may differ).
